title: Nostalgia Craft
body:
[Click here for the 10% discount](https://billing.kinetichosting.net/aff.php?aff=330)
![Discount](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/8f11e54f8aef120c2cad7b93953a2abdd20f3dad_0.webp)

# Do you miss the old minecraft days?
the old lighting, the old world gen, and the old sounds

# **WELL LOOK NO FURTHER**

This pack has all the old alpha and beta items as well as the old combat and lighting system!

Build a house with the old sounds and look of old minecraft while having all the new things too.
- Mobs have their old sounds as well as damage indicators
- terrain ressembles that old world gen style
- and the crafting book is no more!
- ~~REMOVED~~ Herobrine
